source_note: Canonical SignalFoundry public metrics payload derived from the current publish-safe AutoSOC ledger, heartbeat, coverage, and reconciliation state.

metric_definitions.total_cases_processed: Total cases currently tracked in the publish-safe ledger.
metric_definitions.published_escalations: Escalated status IDs with published repo/content artifacts.
metric_definitions.coverage_ratio: Required hosts present versus required hosts in the latest public coverage snapshot.
